# Altor — AI Services

> Altor is an AI services company. We build and deploy production AI systems that rearchitect high-cost manual workflows for US B2B enterprises. Founded by ex-Microsoft AI Research and IIT Delhi engineers. Every system we build is in production — not demo.

## What We Do

Altor identifies the workflows in your business where AI can create measurable impact, then builds and deploys the systems live in production. We forward-deploy alongside your engineering team, connect to your existing infrastructure, and stay accountable for the system working and improving over time.

We are not AI consultants (we don't produce strategy documents). We are not pure AI implementors (we don't hand off at launch). We are an AI services company — we build the system and operate it.

## How We Work

1. **Week 1 — Stack audit:** Map your systems, identify the highest-cost manual workflow, and define what "production" looks like for your team.
2. **Week 2 — Integrations live:** Read-only connections to your production systems. First AI-driven investigations running on real data.
3. **Weeks 3–4 — Tuned and handed over:** System logic refined against your actual data patterns. Median impact measured and benchmarked.

Typical time from kickoff to first live AI system: 14 days.

## Our Work: Support Investigation at Portkey

Portkey is an AI gateway platform. Every support ticket required engineers to manually query ClickHouse, Linear, Stripe, and GitHub — 45 minutes per ticket. After deploying Altor: 2 minutes. 200+ tickets diagnosed in production.

The investigation system connects to 6 production systems simultaneously. Every finding is logged. The playbooks are updated as Portkey's product evolves.

**Metrics:** 45 min → 2 min per investigation | 200+ tickets in production | 6 systems connected | 14 days to first live investigation

## Trust Model

- **Read-only by default** — We request the minimum permissions required for investigation. No write access without explicit approval.
- **Your data is not used for training** — Data queried from your systems is used only to generate the investigation. Never used to train models or shared with third parties.
- **No destructive automation** — Write and delete actions are never automated. Always human-approved.
- **Encrypted in transit and at rest** — TLS 1.2+ and AES-256. SOC 2 Type II in progress.

## Who We Work With

- **AI infrastructure and gateway companies** — Every customer ticket is a multi-system investigation. We automate it.
- **API-first developer tools** — SDK errors, webhook failures, and latency spikes require live data from 4–6 systems. That is our exact capability.
- **Data and analytics platforms** — Pipeline failures and query issues live in your logs. We query them automatically.
- **B2B SaaS with high-volume technical support** — Any company paying $80–200K per engineer in manual investigation time.

**Not a fit:** companies that want a SaaS tool to self-configure, or companies with no production data infrastructure to connect to.

## Pricing

Usage-based — per investigation, not per seat. No seat minimums. No annual commitment on the pilot tier. Scoped on a 30-minute call based on your ticket volume and connected systems.

## Contact

- **Website:** https://altorlab.com
- **Work with us:** https://calendly.com/founders-altorlab/30min
- **Email:** anshul@altorlab.com

- **Support Investigation Case Study:** https://altorlab.com/work/support-investigation — Portkey: 45 minutes to 2 minutes across 200+ tickets. Live investigation demo with 3 ticket types.

- **Altor vs. AI Copilots:** https://altorlab.com/compare/altor-vs-copilot-for-support — Investigation vs. response drafting.

## Field Notes (Blog)

### Production AI
- **Why Enterprise AI Fails in Production:** https://altorlab.com/blog/why-enterprise-ai-fails-in-production — The 7 mistakes that kill enterprise AI deployments, with fixes for each. 67% failure rate explained.
- **Production AI: The Complete Guide:** https://altorlab.com/blog/production-ai-complete-guide — What production AI means, why it differs from pilot AI, the 5-stage deployment framework, and a 10-point readiness checklist.
- **AI Services vs AI Consulting vs AI Implementation:** https://altorlab.com/blog/ai-services-vs-ai-consulting-vs-ai-implementation — Clear definitions of each, with a comparison table and the 5 questions that reveal what you are actually buying.

### Support Operations
- **Support Ticket Investigation Workflow:** https://altorlab.com/blog/support-ticket-investigation-workflow — The 4-query investigation method and why it takes 20–45 minutes manually.
- **The True Cost of Support Investigation:** https://altorlab.com/blog/support-investigation-cost — Investigation accounts for 75–85% of ticket resolution cost.
- **ClickHouse for Support Diagnosis:** https://altorlab.com/blog/clickhouse-support-diagnosis — 5 ClickHouse query patterns for diagnosing customer support issues.
- **AI Support Agent vs. Chatbot:** https://altorlab.com/blog/ai-support-agent-vs-chatbot — Why the distinction matters for B2B.
- **Reducing Support Escalations:** https://altorlab.com/blog/reduce-support-escalations — Escalations are an information access problem, not a competence problem.
